response.original_title: I Do Not Recognize The Bodies In The Water
response.overview: Deep in the woods of America’s forgotten towns, the calm surface of a lake hides something unspeakable. SCP-2316: You Do Not Recognize The Bodies in the Water collides with the sinister history of the Class of ’76 in this mystery horror short film adaptation.  When a couple of SCP Foundation investigators stumble on a long-buried tragedy, they uncover more than just secrets beneath the lake's waterline. The past begins to bleed into the present — with SCP-1423, SCP-332, SCP-4833 and SCP-1833 lurking in the shadows. What starts as a mystery soon becomes a fight against memory itself.
response.title: I Do Not Recognize The Bodies In The Water
